findings.summary: MCP-006: addMutation never persists to electron-store — CRITICAL bug. MCP-002: handleEdit ignores sync.data.mcp servers not in store. MCP-007: DialogEditMcp nested Dialog creates invalid Kobalte portal nesting. MCP-004: validateAndFilterMcpServers silently drops invalid entries.
Plan approved by convention-scout (APPROVED) with finding: shared files (ipc.ts, preload/types.ts) must use produce_fragment for Fix-D

Dialog component renders only Kobalte.Content — nesting creates invalid Kobalte DOM. useDialog replaces (not stacks) dialogs. Inline form pattern from add form (dialog-select-mcp.tsx:230-259) is canonical reference for Fix-C.

Lane 2 plan approved (convention-scout: APPROVED, critic: APPROVED WITH MINOR ISSUES). 5 fixes designed: add persistence (CRITICAL), dual-SOT reconciliation (MAJOR), nested dialog fix (MAJOR), dropped count IPC (MEDIUM), test coverage (MEDIUM). 6 files changed, 1 created. Use produce_fragment for ipc.ts and preload/types.ts.
